name: Sangeethe
overview: "Sangeethe" is an original Sri Lankan Teledrama Series broadcasted by TV Derana. This Teledrama made its debut in 2019. The story is based on two groups of boys which host their own musical Bands. And the story flows on the other characters related to the main characters. This Tele Series contains Social experiences, Romance, Humors and sometimes iconic Fights too.
